orgs.d: Primary civil society network in Malaysia
Co-operative Institute of Malaysia (CIM), previously known as the Co-operative College of Malaysia (CCM), is the only cooperative training institute in Malaysia.
ANGKASA is the apex federation of the co-operative movement in Malaysia.
